feature: 3 New Financial Reports: Rentabilidad por Linea, CxP Aging, CxC Aging
summary: Complete testing of 3 new financial report tabs in Reportes Financieros page. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Backend endpoints return correct structure with all required fields. Frontend displays 7 tabs with proper KPIs, tables, and visual components.

Backend_rentabilidad_linea.details: Returns periodo, lineas array (3 business lines), and totales. Each linea has ventas, costo_mp, costo_servicios, costo_total, margen_bruto, pct_margen, gastos, utilidad.

Backend_cxp_aging.details: Returns fecha_corte, buckets (5 aging periods), total, detalle array, resumen_proveedor. Has 1 record: Colortex SAC, S/15000, vigente bucket.

Backend_cxc_aging.details: Returns correct structure with empty data (total=0, detalle=[]). Handles empty state gracefully.

Backend_date_parameters.details: All 3 endpoints accept date parameters: rentabilidad uses fecha_desde/fecha_hasta, aging reports use fecha_corte.

Backend_bucket_assignment.details: CxP aging correctly assigns buckets based on dias_vencido: vigente (<=0), 1_30, 31_60, 61_90, 90_plus.

Backend_data_integrity.details: Totals match sum of components: CxP total equals bucket sum, rentabilidad totales match lineas sum.

Frontend_7_tabs_visible.details: All 7 tabs visible: Balance General, Estado de Resultados, Flujo de Caja, Inventario Valorizado, Rentabilidad x Linea, CxP Aging, CxC Aging.

Frontend_rentabilidad_tab.details: Shows 4 KPI cards (Ventas, Costo, Margen, Utilidad), table with 9 columns, visual comparison bars, date range filters.

Frontend_cxp_aging_tab.details: Shows 6 KPI cards (Total + 5 buckets), distribution bar (100% green for vigente), proveedor table, detail table, fecha_corte filter.

Frontend_cxc_aging_tab.details: Shows 6 KPI cards (all S/ 0.00), empty state message 'No hay cuentas por cobrar pendientes', fecha_corte filter.

Frontend_date_filters.details: Rentabilidad shows fecha_desde/fecha_hasta range. Aging reports show fecha_corte single date.

tests_executed.name: Frontend: Rentabilidad tab KPIs and table
Frontend: CxP Aging tab with data
Frontend: CxC Aging tab empty state

seed_data_creation: Using existing data: CxP has 1 record (Colortex SAC, S/15000, vigente), CxC has 0 records, Rentabilidad shows 3 business lines with cost data but no sales.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new financial reports fully functional. Backend: GET /api/reportes/rentabilidad-linea returns lineas array with financial metrics per business line. GET /api/reportes/cxp-aging returns aging buckets, detalle, and resumen_proveedor. GET /api/reportes/cxc-aging returns same structure but handles empty data. Frontend: ReportesFinancieros.jsx has 7 tabs with data-testid: rf-tab-rentabilidad, rf-tab-cxp_aging, rf-tab-cxc_aging. Content areas: rentabilidad-linea-content, cxp-aging-content, cxc-aging-content. Tables: rentabilidad-table, cxp-proveedor-table, cxp-detalle-table.
